missions.title: Mastery Module 1: SI units and Related Concepts
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering SI units, fundamental units, derived units and advanced applications.

microtargets.title: SI units
ncertAnchors: NCERT Physics Class 11, Chapter: Physics and Measurement, Section detailing SI units
mustKnowFacts: A thorough understanding of SI units is frequently appears in NEET examinations.
Applying the core principles of SI units correctly is essential for solving integrated numerical and conceptual problems in Physics and Measurement.
commonTraps: Misinterpreting the advanced application scenarios of SI units during high-pressure exam scenarios.
Failing to recall the exact conditions or sign conventions associated with SI units.
masteryCriteria: Understands and can apply concepts of SI units.
Successfully avoids common pitfalls when SI units is integrated with other concepts in Physics and Measurement.
pyqPatterns: NEET PyQs emphasize the application of SI units in tricky assertion-reason or statement-based questions.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain an application where using the concept of SI units can lead to a common student error.
